name: Automated Sentinel
reasoning: V1 best matches the prompt's core requirement of a "cylindrical head crowned by a crystalline eye" with a clean, geometric design. It features excellent prompt adherence with the dormant, motionless stance, strong screen-glow lighting from the crystalline core, and perfect cool steel-blue/teal color identity. V2 has a more humanoid, bulky body design that deviates from the described "cylindrical head" aesthetic, and V3 adds unnecessary humanoid features (visible hands/fingers, antenna-like protrusions) that weren't requested. V1's composition is also superior for card readability with clear focal point and balanced geometry.

artifacts_found.issue: Body design deviates from prompt - more humanoid and bulky rather than a towering stainless steel construct with cylindrical proportions
Adds humanoid features not in prompt (visible hands with fingers, antenna-like protrusions on head, more organic posture) - less geometric and more character-like than intended
